title: Revenue Recognition (ASC 606)
content:
Five-step model:
1. Identify contract with customer
2. Identify performance obligations
3. Determine transaction price
4. Allocate transaction price
5. Recognize revenue when (or as) obligations satisfied

title: Lease Accounting (ASC 842)
content:
Lessees recognize:
- Right-of-use asset
- Lease liability
Classification: Finance vs Operating leases

title: Inventory (ASC 330)
content:
Inventory measured at lower of cost or net realizable value.
Cost flow assumptions: FIFO, LIFO, Weighted Average

title: Property, Plant & Equipment (ASC 360)
content:
Historical cost principle. Depreciation systematically allocates cost.
Impairment testing required when indicators exist.

title: Intangibles (ASC 350)
content:
Finite-life intangibles: Amortize over useful life
Indefinite-life intangibles: No amortization, test for impairment

title: Receivables (ASC 310)
content:
Allowance method required. Direct write-off not GAAP.
Current expected credit losses (CECL) model.
